title: White Eye
desc: A man distressed after losing his bicycle finds it near a building and confronts its new owner, who claims that he bought it a week back. Soon, the local police get involved.

title: Election Night
desc: A politician's family waits for the last 350 votes to be counted, which rattles the family into a comic whirlwind of wild theories, long-held secrets, and a revelation that nobody saw coming.

title: Stop The Buzz, Aldrin!
desc: When the members of the 'Almost Famous' group gather at a ruin pub, an evening filled with rants, laughter and chaos follows.

title: On Becoming a Man
desc: A shy boy faces challenges with his quirky family as he prepares for his Bar Mitzvah, searching for his own identity and voice.

title: Chintaa mani
desc: The idea of a successful future beckons three friends to explore an enchanted stone. However, when the talisman's true abilities are revealed, the boys must break free from an alternate dimension.

title: Fire Extinguisher
desc: When required to install a fire extinguisher in her chapel, Milagros must have it approved by a very special superior.

title: Garden Party
desc: In a deserted house, a group of amphibians explore their surroundings and follow their primal instincts. What happened to the owner of the house? Why are there bullet holes in the window?

title: Harvie Krumpet
desc: Despite a life filled with bad luck, the ever-optimistic Harvie lives his own way and enjoys the small things life has to offer.

title: Wild Life
desc: An Englishman tries to become a rancher on the Canadian frontier in 1909, but he is singularly unsuited to it. His letters home are much sunnier than the reality.

title: Animal Behaviour
desc: Five animals meet regularly to share their problems in group therapy sessions led by Dr Clement, a canine psychotherapist.

title: Mumbai Meri Jaan
desc: A woman narrates her experience of staying in Mumbai. She talks about her love for the city and the allure it holds for those who wish to realise their dreams.

title: Middle Watch
desc: A shattering encounter threatens to tip the balance of sailor's delicate state of mind.

title: My Nephew Emmett
desc: At 2:30 a.m. on Aug. 28, 1955, in the most racially divided state in the country, 64-year-old Mose Wright tries to protect his 14-year-old nephew Emmett Till from two racists who are out for blood.

title: The Suitcase
desc: The ordinary life of Joe, a baggage handler based in an airport in Boston, is turned upside down when he steals a suitcase containing terrorist plans.

title: Notun Dhora
desc: A boy living in an alcoholic family has a lovely connection with his father when he is not drunk.

title: All Is Well
desc: This short documentary has a look at the world of 'Well of Death', at the life of the bikers in their world of brazen.

title: Cuerpo anima
desc: Exploring and exposing the life and experiences of Sergio Hernández, a famous Chilean actor, through the language of 2D frame-by-frame animation with acrylic paintings, portrayed on his own body.

title: Zipped
desc: This is Film - Short Film Category.

title: Sarah's Bag
desc: Featuring the story of Sarah Beydoun, the woman responsible for providing employment for hundreds of women, when the rest of her country would not.

title: Father
desc: During her grandfather's funeral, Karla, an optimistic young girl, tries to understand the concept of heaven and hell. But her world view shatters due to her father's bitter comments.

title: Just in Case
desc: A woman with bipolar disorder tries to explain her daily struggles to her father over a cup of coffee.

title: Piove
desc: Tony Bianchi, a successful doctor, is forced to rethink the purpose of his life after meeting and conversing with several ordinary people.

title: Last Of The Wild
desc: A thought-provoking documentary. Game of Thrones star Kristofer Hivju and adventurer Fredrik Strang explore the Whanganui River, the first river to achieve personhood.

title: Baluji
desc: The filmmaker charts the life and music of legendary blind sitar player Baluji Shrivastav.

title: Varadhan
desc: In a lawless land, a fugitive thief must confront his own past when he witnesses an execution he was never meant to see.

title: Protocole Sandwich
desc: In a wild uninhabited desert, a team of rangers is in charge of rescuing people who got lost there. One of them, Jean-Mi, is going to draw apart from the group and meet an unexpected character.

title: Neem Jamun
desc: A young boy and his grandmother go on a journey despite family disapproval.

title: Termites
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Kati Patang
desc: In a twist of fate, a small-town boy meets a beautiful, mysterious woman and falls head over heels in love. But things soon take an unexpected turn.

title: Meraki
desc: A tale of how artists were coping emotionally through the current circumstances of the world. Eventually they find hope, and it's only their will to create that takes them far in life.

title: Fire Extinguisher
desc: When required to install a fire extinguisher in her chapel, Milagros must have it approved by a very special superior.

title: Believe It Or Not
desc: During a birthday celebration, one friend voices concerns about a nearby hotel that allegedly serves as a front for drug deals.

title: White Eye
desc: A man distressed after losing his bicycle finds it near a building and confronts its new owner, who claims that he bought it a week back. Soon, the local police get involved.

title: Road Dogs
desc: A harrowing, award-winning drama. A trio of teenage girls band together to escape the confines of the foster care system to find one of their biological mothers.

title: Crawl Space
desc: This is Film - Horror Category.

title: Highway Nights
desc: With a crippling need to earn a living in a laborious world, an old lorry driver and a young sex worker form an unusual bond as the sun goes down.

title: Bidaii
desc: An emotional story of a Father & Daughter based on honor killing starring Indian actress and author Sushmita Mukherjee.

title: Wanted MR Kohli
desc: Three friends, a cricket fan, a comedian, and an actress-meet for morning laughs. Unexpected revelations test their bond. Will it bring them closer, or spark new rivalries?

title: Daud
desc: A boy, born from tragedy, faces fears to complete his father's impossible mountain climb.

title: Sundarvan Ki Sundari
desc: This is Film - Comedy Category.

title: Inseparable
desc: When young dad, Joe, discovers he's dying, drifter Charlie is given a unique opportunity to turn his life around. A story of Family, identity and Starting again.

title: Six Shooter
desc: A bloody Irish short about an older man whose wife has died the morning he begins his train journey.

title: Stingray
desc: Kurt visits his local pet shop to buy a new fish. Here he runs into a young teacher named Lucy and after an argument with a resident stingray decides to ask her out on a date.

title: Bitter
desc: When a young girl introduces her boyfriend to her middle-aged father Jack for the first time, he is bewildered at her taste in men.

title: New Bombay Cafe
desc: An ageing woman reminiscences about her incomplete love story in a forgotten cafe, as her past lover takes his final breath.

title: Sometimes, I Think About Dying
desc: Fran likes to think about dying, but befriends a colleague who begins to challenge her mindset.

title: Pasta
desc: A man and a woman eat pasta. They express their love and their heartbreak, they approach and they distance themselves, all while a waiter brings them more pasta.

title: Alex, Listen to Your Heart
desc: Alex has given up on love until his heart calls him on a phone to convince him otherwise.

title: Crush Hour
desc: The lovely lady in the yellow hat and the gentleman in the purple jumper might just be soul mates.

title: Easy Way Out
desc: Martin and Kaitlin play out their relationship endgame in the loft they once called home.

title: Expulsion
desc: The life of a troubled American journalist grappling with depression and addiction is forever altered after he interviews an Algerian refugee, a survivor of the brutal 2018 expulsion.

title: Passionless Moments
desc: From the Oscar-winning Director Jane Campion, one of her first ever shorts films. A collection of everyday awkward and embarrassing moments, each with an uneasy familiarity.

title: Black Sheep Boy
desc: A young boy sets out on thrilling adventures in an unconventional world where anthropomorphic creatures dwell in his quest to find happiness.

title: Toto
desc: A nonagenarian woman falls in love with a robot while training the device to prepare her favourite delicacy. However, her dreams are shattered after the robot undergoes a routine software update.

title: Struggle
desc: A young teacher takes charge of the boys who refuse to go to school.

title: Coach
desc: A principled wrestling coach resists political pressure to compromise. Her team's success and her struggle for integrity lead to a dramatic showdown on the mat.
